infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: GitaSaar needs microphone access for voice input.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: GitaSaar needs camera access to update your profile photo.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: GitaSaar needs photo library access to select your profile photo.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: GitaSaar needs photo library access to save shared cards.

plugins.photosPermission: GitaSaar needs access to your photos to update your profile picture.
plugins.cameraPermission: GitaSaar needs camera access to take a profile photo.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow GitaSaar to access your photos.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Allow GitaSaar to save shared verse cards.
